scope: Authored Blender viewport appearance only. The supplied object has no print object or G-code toolpath assigned, so this checkpoint does not claim slicing, extrusion-path, or machine-output parity.

wireHelpers.authoredCapture: Hidden because Blender Eevee does not render the viewport guide curves; retained in the interactive browser view.

materialGraph.activeSurface: Image Texture -> Hue/Saturation -> Brightness/Contrast -> Material Output Surface
materialGraph.imageState: Referenced datablock is 0 x 0 and the source file is not packed or present in the supplied Node Dojo files.
materialGraph.unusedBranch: The separate Principled BSDF metallic/noise/bump branch is not connected to the active Material Output and therefore does not affect this render.
materialGraph.browser: Generic missing-image Color-surface reconstruction; no replacement logo artwork is invented.

interpretation: The browser preserves the exact evaluated bed geometry and all 95 build-plate material assignments, then reproduces the black result rendered by the supplied Blender file's missing-image active surface. This is a faithful checkpoint for the available source, not a substitute for the unavailable bed image and not a G-code preview.
